title: Carbonfast
description: Client-side mod that makes startup feel faster by deferring expensive resource loading until after the main menu is available.
body:
# Carbon

Carbon is a small client-side Minecraft mod that makes startup feel faster by deferring expensive resource loading until after the main menu is available.

It targets Fabric and NeoForge, with releases built per Minecraft version branch.

## Vanilla vs Carbon

![Vanilla vs Carbon](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/SGE5NFob/images/5d4418d11a2c34cafbe4389d6a335ef903048df0.gif)

## Supported Versions

- `0.1.0-26.1.2`: current branch and main README
- `0.1.0-1.21.11`: older Minecraft branch
- `0.1.0-1.21.4`: older Minecraft branch

## Notes

Carbon is client-only. Install the jar for your loader and Minecraft version.
